# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

@Library('shared-library') _

def ALLOWED_DOMAINS = [
    'company-artifacts.s3.amazonaws.com',
    'artifactory.company.com',
    'releases.company.com'
]

def ALLOWED_PROTOCOLS = ['https']

def MAX_ARTIFACT_SIZE = 500 * 1024 * 1024 // 500MB

def PRODUCTION_SERVERS = [
    'prod-server-01.company.com',
    'prod-server-02.company.com',
    'prod-server-03.company.com'
]

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'URL of the artifact to deploy (must be from approved sources)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'SHA256 checksum of the artifact for verification'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'DEPLOYMENT_TYPE',
            choices: ['blue-green', 'rolling', 'canary'],
            description: 'Deployment strategy'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'REQUIRE_APPROVAL',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Require manual approval before deployment'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_USER',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'User requesting deployment (for audit)'
        )
    }
    
    options {
        timestamps()
        timeout(time: 1, unit: 'HOURS')
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30'))
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
    }
    
    environment {
        ARTIFACT_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        DEPLOY_DIR = "/opt/applications/myapp"
        BACKUP_DIR = "/opt/backups/myapp"
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Parameter Validation ==="
                    
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL) {
                        error("ARTIFACT_URL parameter is required")
                    }
                    
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM) {
                        error("ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM parameter is required for security verification")
                    }
                    
                    if (!params.DEPLOY_USER) {
                        error("DEPLOY_USER parameter is required for audit trail")
                    }
                    
                    if (params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM.length() != 64) {
                        error("ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM must be a valid SHA256 hash (64 characters)")
                    }
                    
                    echo "Parameters validated successfully"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Security Validation') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Security Validation ==="
                    
                    def url = new URL(params.ARTIFACT_URL)
                    def protocol = url.getProtocol()
                    def host = url.getHost()
                    def path = url.getPath()
                    
                    echo "Validating URL: ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                    echo "Protocol: ${protocol}"
                    echo "Host: ${host}"
                    echo "Path: ${path}"
                    
                    if (!ALLOWED_PROTOCOLS.contains(protocol)) {
                        error("Protocol '${protocol}' is not allowed. Only ${ALLOWED_PROTOCOLS} are permitted.")
                    }
                    
                    def domainAllowed = ALLOWED_DOMAINS.any { allowedDomain ->
                        host == allowedDomain || host.endsWith(".${allowedDomain}")
                    }
                    
                    if (!domainAllowed) {
                        error("Domain '${host}' is not in the approved list. Allowed domains: ${ALLOWED_DOMAINS}")
                    }
                    
                    if (path.contains("..")) {
                        error("Path traversal detected in URL. Deployment blocked.")
                    }
                    
                    if (path.contains(";") || path.contains("|") || path.contains("&")) {
                        error("Suspicious characters detected in URL path. Deployment blocked.")
                    }
                    
                    def allowedExtensions = ['.jar', '.war', '.zip', '.tar.gz', '.tgz']
                    def hasAllowedExtension = allowedExtensions.any { ext -> path.toLowerCase().endsWith(ext) }
                    
                    if (!hasAllowedExtension) {
                        error("Artifact must have one of the allowed extensions: ${allowedExtensions}")
                    }
                    
                    echo "Security validation passed"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Downloading Artifact ==="
                    
                    sh "mkdir -p ${ARTIFACT_DIR}"
                    
                    def artifactName = params.ARTIFACT_URL.tokenize('/').last()
                    def sanitizedName = artifactName.replaceAll('[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]', '_')
                    def artifactPath = "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${sanitizedName}"
                    
                    echo "Downloading to: ${artifactPath}"
                    
                    def downloadStatus = sh(
                        script: """
                            curl -f -L --max-filesize ${MAX_ARTIFACT_SIZE} \
                                 --max-time 600 \
                                 --retry 3 \
                                 --retry-delay 5 \
                                 -o '${artifactPath}' \
                                 '${params.ARTIFACT_URL}'
                        """,
                        returnStatus: true
                    )
                    
                    if (downloadStatus != 0) {
                        error("Failed to download artifact. Status code: ${downloadStatus}")
                    }
                    
                    def fileSize = sh(
                        script: "stat -f%z '${artifactPath}' 2>/dev/null || stat -c%s '${artifactPath}'",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim().toLong()
                    
                    echo "Downloaded artifact size: ${fileSize} bytes"
                    
                    if (fileSize > MAX_ARTIFACT_SIZE) {
                        sh "rm -f '${artifactPath}'"
                        error("Artifact size exceeds maximum allowed size of ${MAX_ARTIFACT_SIZE} bytes")
                    }
                    
                    if (fileSize == 0) {
                        sh "rm -f '${artifactPath}'"
                        error("Downloaded artifact is empty")
                    }
                    
                    env.ARTIFACT_PATH = artifactPath
                    env.ARTIFACT_NAME = sanitizedName
                    
                    echo "Artifact downloaded successfully"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Verify Checksum') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Verifying Artifact Checksum ==="
                    
                    def actualChecksum = sh(
                        script: "sha256sum '${env.ARTIFACT_PATH}' | awk '{print \$1}'",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim()
                    
                    echo "Expected checksum: ${params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM}"
                    echo "Actual checksum:   ${actualChecksum}"
                    
                    if (actualChecksum != params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM) {
                        sh "rm -f '${env.ARTIFACT_PATH}'"
                        error("Checksum verification failed! Artifact may be corrupted or tampered with.")
                    }
                    
                    echo "Checksum verification passed"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Scan Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Scanning Artifact for Security Issues ==="
                    
                    def scanResult = sh(
                        script: """
                            if command -v clamscan &> /dev/null; then
                                clamscan --no-summary '${env.ARTIFACT_PATH}'
                            else
                                echo "ClamAV not installed, skipping virus scan"
                                exit 0
                            fi
                        """,
                        returnStatus: true
                    )
                    
                    if (scanResult != 0) {
                        sh "rm -f '${env.ARTIFACT_PATH}'"
                        error("Security scan detected issues in the artifact")
                    }
                    
                    echo "Artifact scan completed successfully"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Approval') {
            when {
                expression { params.REQUIRE_APPROVAL == true }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Deployment Approval Required ==="
                    
                    def deploymentInfo = """
                    Deployment Request:
                    - Artifact: ${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}
                    - Source URL: ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}
                    - Checksum: ${params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM}
                    - Requested by: ${params.DEPLOY_USER}
                    - Strategy: ${params.DEPLOYMENT_TYPE}
                    - Target: Production (${PRODUCTION_SERVERS.size()} servers)
                    """
                    
                    echo deploymentInfo
                    
                    timeout(time: 30, unit: 'MINUTES') {
                        input(
                            message: "Approve deployment to production?",
                            ok: 'Deploy',
                            submitter: 'prod-deployers,admin',
                            parameters: [
                                text(
                                    name: 'APPROVAL_NOTES',
                                    defaultValue: '',
                                    description: 'Approval notes (optional)'
                                )
                            ]
                        )
                    }
                    
                    echo "Deployment approved"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Backup Current Version') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Backing Up Current Version ==="
                    
                    def timestamp = new Date().format('yyyyMMdd-HHmmss')
                    
                    PRODUCTION_SERVERS.each { server ->
                        echo "Backing up on ${server}"
                        
                        sh """
                            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no deploy@${server} '
                                if [ -d ${DEPLOY_DIR} ]; then
                                    sudo mkdir -p ${BACKUP_DIR}
                                    sudo tar -czf ${BACKUP_DIR}/backup-${timestamp}.tar.gz -C ${DEPLOY_DIR} . || true
                                    echo "Backup created: ${BACKUP_DIR}/backup-${timestamp}.tar.gz"
                                else
                                    echo "No existing deployment to backup"
                                fi
                            '
                        """
                    }
                    
                    env.BACKUP_TIMESTAMP = timestamp
                    echo "Backup completed"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Deploying to Production ==="
                    echo "Strategy: ${params.DEPLOYMENT_TYPE}"
                    
                    switch(params.DEPLOYMENT_TYPE) {
                        case 'blue-green':
                            deployBlueGreen()
                            break
                        case 'rolling':
                            deployRolling()
                            break
                        case 'canary':
                            deployCanary()
                            break
                        default:
                            error("Unknown deployment type: ${params.DEPLOYMENT_TYPE}")
                    }
                    
                    echo "Deployment completed successfully"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Health Check') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Performing Health Checks ==="
                    
                    def healthChecksPassed = true
                    
                    PRODUCTION_SERVERS.each { server ->
                        echo "Checking health on ${server}"
                        
                        def healthStatus = sh(
                            script: """
                                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no deploy@${server} '
                                    curl -f -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8080/health || echo "000"
                                '
                            """,
                            returnStdout: true
                        ).trim()
                        
                        if (healthStatus != "200") {
                            echo "WARNING: Health check failed on ${server} (status: ${healthStatus})"
                            healthChecksPassed = false
                        } else {
                            echo "Health check passed on ${server}"
                        }
                    }
                    
                    if (!healthChecksPassed) {
                        error("Health checks failed on one or more servers")
                    }
                    
                    echo "All health checks passed"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Audit Log') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Recording Audit Log ==="
                    
                    def auditEntry = [
                        timestamp: new Date().format('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),
                        build_number: env.BUILD_NUMBER,
                        deploy_user: params.DEPLOY_USER,
                        artifact_url: params.ARTIFACT_URL,
                        artifact_checksum: params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM,
                        deployment_type: params.DEPLOYMENT_TYPE,
                        servers: PRODUCTION_SERVERS,
                        status: 'SUCCESS'
                    ]
                    
                    writeJSON file: "${WORKSPACE}/audit-${env.BUILD_NUMBER}.json", json: auditEntry
                    
                    sh """
                        echo '${new Date().format('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')} | ${params.DEPLOY_USER} | ${env.ARTIFACT_NAME} | ${params.DEPLOYMENT_TYPE} | SUCCESS' >> /var/log/jenkins/deployment-audit.log
                    """
                    
                    echo "Audit log recorded"
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            script {
                echo "=== Deployment Successful ==="
                emailext(
                    subject: "SUCCESS: Production Deployment - ${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}",
                    body: """
                    Deployment completed successfully.
                    
                    Details:
                    - Artifact: ${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}
                    - Deployed by: ${params.DEPLOY_USER}
                    - Strategy: ${params.DEPLOYMENT_TYPE}
                    - Build: ${env.BUILD_URL}
                    - Servers: ${PRODUCTION_SERVERS.join(', ')}
                    """,
                    to: 'ops-team@company.com',
                    mimeType: 'text/plain'
                )
            }
        }
        
        failure {
            script {
                echo "=== Deployment Failed ==="
                emailext(
                    subject: "FAILED: Production Deployment - ${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}",
                    body: """
                    Deployment failed!
                    
                    Details:
                    - Artifact: ${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}
                    - Requested by: ${params.DEPLOY_USER}
                    - Build: ${env.BUILD_URL}
                    
                    Please check the logs and initiate rollback if necessary.
                    """,
                    to: 'ops-team@company.com',
                    mimeType: 'text/plain'
                )
            }
        }
        
        always {
            script {
                echo "=== Cleanup ==="
                sh "rm -rf ${ARTIFACT_DIR}"
            }
        }
    }
}

def deployBlueGreen() {
    echo "Executing Blue-Green deployment"
    
    PRODUCTION_SERVERS.each { server ->
        echo "Deploying to ${server}"
        
        sh """
            scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${env.ARTIFACT_PATH}' deploy@${server}:/tmp/${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}
            
            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no deploy@${server} '
                sudo mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR}-green
                sudo rm -rf ${DEPLOY_DIR}-green/*
                
                cd ${DEPLOY_DIR}-green
                sudo unzip -q /tmp/${env.ARTIFACT_NAME} || sudo tar -xzf /tmp/${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}
                
                sudo systemctl stop myapp-blue || true
                sudo systemctl start myapp-green
                sleep 5
                
                if curl -f http://localhost:8081/health; then
                    sudo rm -rf ${DEPLOY_DIR}-blue
                    sudo mv ${DEPLOY_DIR}-green ${DEPLOY_DIR}-blue
                    sudo systemctl stop myapp-green
                    sudo systemctl start myapp-blue
                    echo "Blue-Green deployment successful"
                else
                    sudo systemctl stop myapp-green
                    sudo systemctl start myapp-blue
                    echo "Health check failed, rolled back"
                    exit 1
                fi
                
                rm -f /tmp/${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}
            '
        """
    }
}

def deployRolling() {
    echo "Executing Rolling deployment"
    
    PRODUCTION_SERVERS.each { server ->
        echo "Deploying to ${server}"
        
        sh """
            scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${env.ARTIFACT_PATH}' deploy@${server}:/tmp/${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}
            
            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no deploy@${server} '
                sudo systemctl stop myapp
                
                sudo mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR}
                sudo rm -rf ${DEPLOY_DIR}/*
                
                cd ${DEPLOY_DIR}
                sudo unzip -q /tmp/${env.ARTIFACT_NAME} || sudo tar -xzf /tmp/${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}
                
                sudo systemctl start myapp
                sleep 10
                
                if ! curl -f http://localhost:8080/health; then
                    echo "Health check failed on ${server}"
                    exit 1
                fi
                
                rm -f /tmp/${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}
            '
        """
        
        echo "Waiting before next server..."
        sleep 30
    }
}

def deployCanary() {
    echo "Executing Canary deployment"
    
    def canaryServer = PRODUCTION_SERVERS[0]
    def remainingServers = PRODUCTION_SERVERS.drop(1)
    
    echo "Deploying to canary server: ${canaryServer}"
    
    sh """
        scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${env.ARTIFACT_PATH}' deploy@${canaryServer}:/tmp/${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}
        
        ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no deploy@${canaryServer} '
            sudo systemctl stop myapp
            sudo mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR}
            sudo rm -rf ${DEPLOY_DIR}/*
            cd ${DEPLOY_DIR}
            sudo unzip -q /tmp/${env.ARTIFACT_NAME} || sudo tar -xzf /tmp/${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}
            sudo systemctl start myapp
            rm -f /tmp/${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}
        '
    """
    
    echo "Monitoring canary for 5 minutes..."
    sleep 300
    
    def canaryHealthy = sh(
        script: "ssh deploy@${canaryServer} 'curl -f http://localhost:8080/health'",
        returnStatus: true
    ) == 0
    
    if (!canaryHealthy) {
        error("Canary deployment failed health check")
    }
    
    echo "Canary successful, deploying to remaining servers"
    
    remainingServers.each { server ->
        echo "Deploying to ${server}"
        
        sh """
            scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${env.ARTIFACT_PATH}' deploy@${server}:/tmp/${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}
            
            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no deploy@${server} '
                sudo systemctl stop myapp
                sudo mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR}
                sudo rm -rf ${DEPLOY_DIR}/*
                cd ${DEPLOY_DIR}
                sudo unzip -q /tmp/${env.ARTIFACT_NAME} || sudo tar -xzf /tmp/${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}
                sudo systemctl start myapp
                rm -f /tmp/${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}
            '
        """
    }
}
